error_signature: SyntaxError: Expected property name or '}' in JSON
title: JSON parsing error in AI agent output
symptom: The AI agent returns a parsing error indicating that the JSON format is incorrect. This prevents the workflow from executing properly.
applies_when: Using an AI agent to generate JSON output
Output includes extraneous text before JSON
not_this_if: Output is valid JSON without additional text
Error occurs in a different context
root_cause: The AI agent's output includes extra text (like 'json ') before the actual JSON object, causing the JSON parser to fail. This typically happens when the prompt does not specify the expected format clearly.
fix_steps: Modify the prompt sent to the AI agent to include 'Reply only with a correct JSON object. No other words or sentence.'
Test the output again to ensure it returns valid JSON without additional text.
agent_instruction: Update the AI agent's prompt to ensure it outputs only valid JSON.
